title: conyza schiedeana
intro: Conyza schiedeana, also known as Mexican Fleabane, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Mexico and parts of Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Conyza schiedeana include its potential to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Conyza schiedeana is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture form or added to topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
